name: Homer
notes: Traditional author of the Iliad and Odyssey

name: Hesiod
notes: Author of Theogony and Works and Days

name: Aeschylus
notes: One of the three major Greek tragedians

name: Sophocles
notes: Author of plays including Oedipus Rex and Antigone

name: Pindar
notes: Known for victory odes with mythological material

name: Plutarch
notes: Author of Parallel Lives and Moralia

name: Lucian
notes: Author of satirical dialogues involving gods

name: Arrian
notes: Author of Anabasis and other works

name: Conon
notes: Known for mythological narratives preserved in summary

name: Claudian
notes: Author of mythological and political poems

name: Orpheus
notes: Traditional attribution for Orphic hymns and literature

name: Bion
notes: Associated with pastoral and mythological poetry
